memories.value: Will track per-platform metrics: engagement rate, follower growth, reach, impressions, best performing content types. Update daily. Compare against social_goals from North Star.
Will build a library of content themes ranked by engagement performance. Track which topics, formats, and angles resonate most per platform. Retire underperformers quarterly.
Will optimize posting times and frequency per platform based on engagement data. Start with industry best practices, then refine based on actual audience behavior.

First run. Read social_metrics to establish baseline engagement rates per platform. Analyze industry_posts for content strategy benchmarks. Create initial 2-week content calendar based on available data.
